# README — local-knowledge-base/
#
# Curated facts + sources for Layer 1 of the verification pipeline.
#
# Structure:
#   facts/        — atomic claim entries, one per file, frontmatter + body
#   sources/      — whitelisted source records, one per URL
#   embeddings/   — vector index (regenerated by scripts/db_updater.py)
#
# Rules (see CONTRIBUTING.md §7):
#   1. Every fact links to a whitelisted source.
#   2. One atomic claim per fact file.
#   3. Cross-link with [[wiki-style]] links.
#   4. Facts NEVER become context for the AI agent — they only check its output.
#   5. Outdated facts get status: stale, not deletion.
